commands.name: Conformance + engine self-test
commands.fix: Run `npm test` (conformance/validate.mjs + checks/selftest.mjs) and fix the reported divergence; if a contract shape changed legitimately, update the schema, fixtures, and emitters together.

commands.name: Python reference emitter selftest
commands.fix: Run `python3 emitters/python/selftest.py` and fix the reported divergence; if the contract shape changed legitimately, update the emitter and fixtures together.

commands.name: Harness verdict self-test
commands.fix: Run `node harness/selftest.mjs` and fix the reported divergence in harness/policy.mjs.
